taoofmac.com github.com/rcarmo

Rui Carmo

Principal Architect/Software Engineer & Hardware Tinkerer — taoofmac.com

Open source projects across AI agents, terminals, deployment tooling, macOS utilities, and homelab infrastructure. Most things here are tools I built because the tool I wanted didn't exist.

Highlight

piclaw

A self-hosted AI agent workspace — streaming web UI, multi-provider LLM, built-in terminal, file editor, document viewers, draw.io, kanban, VNC client, MCP access, and persistent state. One container, no CDN, no setup wizard.

★ 526 TypeScript agents self-hosted bun docker
View project → GitHub

piku

piku/piku

The tiniest PaaS — git push deployments to your own server, Heroku-style, zero infrastructure. Started here in 2016, now maintained by the piku org.

★ 6,569 →

AI & Agent tooling

vibes
Mobile-first web UI for AI agents — ACP and Pi over RPC, zero build step. One Python file, one HTML file.
★ 142Python
agentbox
Docker sandbox for coding agents — Copilot CLI, Codex, Pi preinstalled. Docker, SSH, RDP are opt-in.
★ 97Dockerfile
feed-summarizer
LLM-powered RSS digest — full-text extraction, runs on a Raspberry Pi, powers feeds.carmo.io.
★ 27Python
umcp
Micro MCP server — zero deps, decorator-based tool registration. Three lines to add MCP to any Python script.
★ 11Python
go-busybox
57 BusyBox utilities in Go — compiles to a 2 MB WASM binary for agent sandboxes. 387/387 tests passing.
★ 10Go
pve-microvm
QEMU microvm for Proxmox VE — KVM isolation at container speed. Under 200 ms boot. Fully reversible.
★ 3Shell

Terminal stack

webterm
Go web terminal with multi-session dashboard mode — built for watching AI agents run in parallel. WASM renderer.
★ 106Go
ghostty-web
Ghostty terminal sessions in a browser with xterm.js API compatibility.
★ 5TypeScript
go-rdp
Browser-based RDP client — full MS-RDPBCGR spec, Go backend, WASM frontend.
★ 9Go
go-te
VT100/VT520 terminal library for Go — pyte-faithful, ESCTest2, SVG export. Powers webterm, go-rdp, ghostty-web.
★ 7Go
gotel
Self-contained OTel collector — SQLite storage, built-in trace viewer. Replaces Collector+Jaeger+Grafana.
★ 5Go

macOS & Apple

PhotosExport
Export your complete Apple Photos library — originals, edits, Live Photos, burst frames, metadata.
★ 280Swift
drawterm
Plan 9 drawterm for modern macOS — HiDPI scaling, Metal rendering, Connect dialog, clipboard bridge.
★ 26C
homekit-steam
Switch Steam accounts on a shared gaming PC via HomeKit. No Steam API, no Valve servers.
★ 41Python
macemu
Basilisk II and SheepShaver for Raspberry Pi — SDL2 framebuffer, no X11, pre-built arm64 .deb packages.
★ 3Cpp

Infrastructure & homelab

ground-init
Idempotent Linux bootstrap — YAML-driven desired-state, like cloud-init but for bare metal.
★ 64Python
azure-stable-diffusion
One-command Stable Diffusion on Azure GPU spot instances. make deploy / make open / make destroy.
★ 44Makefile
proxmox-zpool-monitoring
ZFS pool metrics for Proxmox exported to Graphite. Cron job only — no daemon, no agent.
★ 7Python
gnome-thumbnailers
Thumbnails for RAW photos, HEIC, and 3D files in GNOME Files. make install — no restart.
★ 26Python

Hardware & keyboards

zmk-config-totem
ZMK keymap for the Totem 34-key split keyboard — tuned home row mods, combos, ZMK Studio. 7:2 forks-to-stars.
★ 2misc
